category_sources: source_facts.description says CD/DVD/Blu-ray premastering and recording software; official cdrtools page calls it CD/DVD/BluRay command line recording software.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is cdrtools; official cdrtools page uses Cdrtools.
docs_sources: Official cdrtools site hosts recent manpages and the cdrtools release information page.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; no official source-control repository URL was confirmed from official cdrtools sources.
